contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Track Map: roadmap page, SOP, and dependency corrections
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/562
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/563
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/564
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/567
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/568
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/249
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/257
  
  Details:
  Built and deployed the DAO's live track map across multiple sessions:
  
  1. **TRACK_MAP.md** — Created the single-source-of-truth track map in agentic_ai_context with Mermaid dependency diagram, quick-reference table, and detail cards for all 9 active tracks
  2. **ROADMAP_UPDATE_SOP.md** — Created standard operating procedure so any agent (Sophia, Claude, Grok) knows how to update the roadmap
  3. **truesight.me/roadmap** — Built the live HTML page with embedded Mermaid diagram, anchor-linked track cards, and mobile-responsive design. Deployed to beta then promoted to prod
  4. **Dependency corrections** — Fixed Legal Entity Structuring and GACC/Brazil Compliance from "blocking" to "parallel" tracks per governor direction
  5. **Downstream chain** — Documented Matheus → Omega Services → SeaCoast Logistics → Kirsten logistics chain
  6. **Aora event plan** — Saved Jerri's 40-page PDF to .github/attachments and linked from the roadmap
  7. **CNAE timeline screenshot** — Saved Matheus's 5-20 business day estimate to .github/attachments
  
  PRs merged:
  - agentic_ai_context#562 (initial TRACK_MAP.md)
  - agentic_ai_context#563 (ROADMAP_UPDATE_SOP.md)
  - agentic_ai_context#564 (SOP reference in OPERATING_INSTRUCTIONS.md)
  - agentic_ai_context#567 (dependency corrections)
  - agentic_ai_context#568 (anchor links + missing tracks)
  - truesight_me_beta#249 (live roadmap HTML page)
  - truesight_autopilot#257 (append_to_transcript bug fix)
- Contributor(s): Sophia Truesight
